summary:
The needle (the bug causing the test failure) was in the nginx configuration file at `/etc/nginx/sites-available/default`, specifically a port mismatch in the upstream proxy setting. I fixed it by updating the proxy_pass from `http://127.0.0.1:5001` to `http://127.0.0.1:5000`.

Running `./test.sh` now confirms the fix: **All tests passed.**
